sentences.target: J'enterre la boîte dans le jardin.

translations.fr: J'enterre la boîte dans le jardin.
translations.en: I’m burying the box in the garden.
translations.es: Estoy enterrando la caja en el jardín.
translations.de: Ich vergrabe die Kiste im Garten.
translations.it: Sto seppellendo la scatola in giardino.
translations.pt: Estou enterrando a caixa no jardim.
translations.vi: Tôi đang chôn cái hộp trong vườn.
translations.nl: Ik begraaf de doos in de tuin.
translations.hi: मैं बगीचे में डिब्बा गाड़ रहा हूँ.
translations.id: Saya sedang mengubur kotak di taman.
translations.ja: 庭に箱を埋めています。

tokens.explanation: Finite verb with attached clitic subject; 1st person singular, present indicative of ‘enterrer’; transitive.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing ‘boîte’.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of the verb.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, masculine singular, introducing ‘jardin’.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘dans’.

sentences.target: On enterre le trésor sur la plage.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ɑ̃tɛʁ lə tʁezɔʁ syʁ la plaʒ/

translations.fr: On enterre le trésor sur la plage.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ɑ̃tɛʁ lə tʁezɔʁ syʁ la plaʒ/
translations.en: We’re burying the treasure on the beach.
translations.es: Estamos enterrando el tesoro en la playa.
translations.de: Wir vergraben den Schatz am Strand.
translations.it: Stiamo seppellendo il tesoro sulla spiaggia.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们把宝藏埋在海滩上。
translations.pt: Estamos enterrando o tesouro na praia.
translations.he: אנחנו קוברים את האוצר בחוף הים.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang chôn kho báu trên bãi biển.
translations.nl: We begraven de schat op het strand.
translations.hu: A kincset a strandon ássuk el.
translations.hi: हम समुद्र तट पर खजाना गाड़ रहे हैं.
translations.id: Kami sedang mengubur harta karun di pantai.
translations.ja: 砂浜に宝物を埋めています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun; 3rd person singular in form, generic meaning.
Main verb, 3rd person singular, present indicative.
Definite article, masculine singular.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object.
Preposition expressing location.
Definite article, feminine singular.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of ‘sur’.

sentences.target: Tu veux enterrer ce secret avec moi.
sentences.reading: /ty vø ɑ̃teʁe sə səkʁɛ avɛk mwa/

translations.fr: Tu veux enterrer ce secret avec moi.
translations.ipa: /ty vø ɑ̃teʁe sə səkʁɛ avɛk mwa/
translations.en: Do you want to bury this secret with me?
translations.de: Willst du dieses Geheimnis mit mir begraben?
translations.it: Vuoi seppellire questo segreto con me?
translations.ko: 나랑 같이 이 비밀을 묻고 싶어?
translations.zh-Hans: 你想和我一起把这个秘密埋起来吗？
translations.yue: 你想同我一齊將呢個秘密埋起嚟嗎？
translations.ru: Хочешь закопать этот секрет со мной?
translations.pt: Você quer enterrar este segredo comigo?
translations.he: אתה רוצה לקבור את הסוד הזה איתי?
translations.tr: Bu sırrı benimle birlikte gömmek ister misin?
translations.vi: Bạn có muốn chôn bí mật này cùng tôi không?
translations.ar: هل تريد أن تدفن هذا السر معي؟
translations.nl: Wil je dit geheim met mij begraven?
translations.uk: Хочеш закопати цю таємницю зі мною?
translations.hu: El akarod ásni velem ezt a titkot?
translations.hi: क्या तुम मेरे साथ इस राज़ को गाड़ना चाहते हो?
translations.pl: Chcesz zakopać tę tajemnicę ze mną?
translations.el: Θέλεις να θάψεις αυτό το μυστικό μαζί μου;
translations.nb: Vil du begrave denne hemmeligheten med meg?
translations.id: Kamu mau mengubur rahasia ini bersamaku?
translations.sv: Vill du begrava den här hemligheten med mig?
translations.ro: Vrei să îngropi acest secret cu mine?
translations.cs: Chceš se mnou zakopat tohle tajemství?
translations.da: Vil du begrave denne hemmelighed sammen med mig?
translations.ja: 一緒にこの秘密を埋めたい？

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun; 2nd person singular.
Main verb, 2nd person singular, present indicative.
Infinitive verb; complement of ‘veux’; transitive.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular, modifying ‘secret’.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘enterrer’.
Preposition introducing an accompanying complement.
Stressed/disjunctive pronoun, 1st person singular; object of ‘avec’.

sentences.target: Ils enterrent les câbles sous le trottoir.
sentences.reading: /il ɑ̃tɛʁ le kabl su lə tʁɔtwaʁ/

translations.fr: Ils enterrent les câbles sous le trottoir.
translations.ipa: /il ɑ̃tɛʁ le kabl su lə tʁɔtwaʁ/
translations.en: They’re burying the cables under the sidewalk.
translations.es: Están enterrando los cables debajo de la acera.
translations.de: Sie vergraben die Kabel unter dem Gehweg.
translations.it: Stanno seppellendo i cavi sotto il marciapiede.
translations.ko: 그들은 보도 아래에 케이블을 묻고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们把电缆埋在人行道下面。
translations.yue: 佢哋喺行人路底下埋電纜。
translations.pt: Eles estão enterrando os cabos sob a calçada.
translations.he: הם קוברים את הכבלים מתחת למדרכה.
translations.vi: Họ đang chôn các dây cáp dưới vỉa hè.
translations.nl: Ze begraven de kabels onder de stoep.
translations.hu: A kábeleket a járda alá ásják.
translations.hi: वे फुटपाथ के नीचे केबलें गाड़ रहे हैं.
translations.el: Θάβουν τα καλώδια κάτω από το πεζοδρόμιο.
translations.id: Mereka sedang mengubur kabel di bawah trotoar.
translations.ja: 彼らは歩道の下にケーブルを埋めています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun; 3rd person plural (masculine or mixed).
Main verb, 3rd person plural, present indicative.
Definite article, plural.
Common noun, masculine plural; direct object.
Preposition expressing location (‘under’).
Definite article, masculine singular.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of ‘sous’.
